installCommand: if [ -d client ]; then cd client && npm ci --include=dev && cd ../server && npm ci --include=dev; else npm ci --include=dev && if [ -d ../server ]; then cd ../server && npm ci --include=dev; fi; fi
buildCommand: if [ -d client ]; then cd client && npm run build && cd .. && rm -rf dist && cp -R client/dist dist && cd server && npm run prisma:generate; else npm run build && if [ -d ../server ]; then cd ../server && npm run prisma:generate; fi; fi
